design_philosophy.core_loop: Real-time sword combat exploration loop: navigate towns and dungeons, engage enemies in action-based combat, gain experience and equipment, progress toward confronting corrupting evil force
design_philosophy.primary_tension: Balance between real-time action reflexes and RPG progression mechanics; player vulnerability despite leveling
design_philosophy.player_fantasy: Champion of Light cleansing corrupted lands through skilled swordplay and environmental exploration
design_philosophy.what_makes_it_opinionated: Hybrid action-RPG approach blending real-time collision-based combat (similar to Ys series) with traditional RPG progression systems; commitment to top-down perspective with sword-centric mechanics rather than menu-driven combat

difficulty.player_agency_in_difficulty: Experience and equipment acquisition provide gradual power progression that can mitigate encounter difficulty through preparation

progression.upgrade_system: Experience-based leveling system combined with equipment management; character becomes stronger through accumulated experience from defeated enemies
progression.unlock_mechanism: Geographic progression through towns, landscapes, and dungeons; story-gated access via NPC interactions and item acquisition
replayability_hooks: Different combat encounters reward pattern recognition
X68000 version offers significantly different gameplay mechanics and story sequencing for comparative play

world_building_techniques: Environmental storytelling through corrupted water afflicting towns and NPCs
Character dialogue revealing backstory (Nasir's training under Mathias, Zerah's manipulation of Thor)
Animated cutscenes in X68000 version establishing narrative stakes
Geographic progression reflecting story arc (pursuing source of corruption, ultimately confronting Evil Spirit)

boss_design.philosophy: Significant boss encounters serve as narrative checkpoints and progression barriers; giant bosses represent tangible threats to Lakeland's salvation
notable_bosses: Zerah - primary antagonist warlock aligned with Darkness, orchestrating water pollution and Evil Spirit resurrection
Thor - skilled swordsman with heterochromatic eyes, aligned with forces of Darkness
Evil Spirit - final threat hidden beneath Lagoon Castle, the ultimate corrupting force

faction_indicators: Forces of Light (Nasir, Mathias, Felicia) - restoration and purification
Forces of Darkness (Zerah, Thor, Duma, Battler) - corruption and subjugation
danger_signals: Muddy water pollution spreading sickness and death across Lakeland
Lagoon Castle lifted into clouds by Zerah (environmental catastrophe)
Evil Spirit awakening beneath corrupted waters (existential threat)
environmental_storytelling: Contaminated water as visual corruption marker affecting all explored regions
Contrast between healthy towns and corrupted landscapes indicating progression toward source
Lagoon Castle's elevated position symbolizing lost hope and inaccessible salvation
